controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the provisions contained under rule 21 of the foreign exchange management (overseas investment) rules, 2022 dated august 22, 2022 and p
controls.control_description:
Part I - Acquisition or Transfer of Immovable Property outside India by a
person resident in India
4The acquisition or transfer of immovable property outside India by a person resident
in India shall be governed by the provisions contained under Rule 21 of the Foreign
Exchange Management (Overseas Investment) Rules, 2022 dated August 22, 2022
and paragraph 25 of the Foreign Exchange Management (Overseas Investment)
Directions, 2022 dated August 22, 2022.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the provisions contained under rule 21 of the foreign exchange management (overseas investment) rules, 2022 dated august 22, 2022 and p

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed accordingly
controls.control_description:
(DIR Series) Circular No.12 with effect from August 22, 2022, the acquisition and transfer of Immovable
property shall be governed accordingly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed accordingly

controls.control_objective: To ensure the buying or drawing of foreign exchange from an authorised dealer in india and remitting it outside india through banking channels or crediting it t
controls.control_description:
2.3 ‘Repatriation outside India’ means the buying or drawing of foreign exchange
from an authorised dealer in India and remitting it outside India through banking
channels or crediting it to an account denominated in foreign currency or to an
account in Indian currency maintained with an authorised dealer from which it can be
converted in foreign currency.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the buying or drawing of foreign exchange from an authorised dealer in india and remitting it outside india through banking channels or crediting it t

controls.control_objective: To ensure relative as defined in section 2(77) of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description: 2.5 ‘Relative’ means relative as defined in section 2(77) of the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to relative as defined in section 2(77) of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure an individual (not being a citizen of pakistan or bangladesh or sri lanka or afghanistan or china or iran or nepal or bhutan) who at any time, held a
controls.control_description:
Prior to insertion it read as, “A ‘Person of Indian Origin' means an individual (not being a citizen of Pakistan 
or Bangladesh or Sri Lanka or Afghanistan or China or Iran or Nepal or Bhutan) who at any time, held an Indian Passport or who or either of 
whose father or mother or whose grandfather or grandmother was a citizen of India by virtue of the Constitution of India or the Citizenship 
Act, 1955 (57 of 1955).” 
8 Inserted by FEM (Acquisition and transfer of Immovable Property in India) Regulations, 2018 with effect from March 26, 2018 through 
FEMA 21(R), dated 26.03.2018.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an individual (not being a citizen of pakistan or bangladesh or sri lanka or afghanistan or china or iran or nepal or bhutan) who at any time, held a

controls.control_objective: To ensure transfer any immovable property in india to a person resident in india
controls.control_description:
(a) 13An NRI or an OCI may transfer any immovable property in India to a person
resident in India;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transfer any immovable property in india to a person resident in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure transfer any immovable property (other than agricultural land or plantation property or farmhouse) to an nri or 15an oci
controls.control_description:
(b) 14An NRI or an OCI may transfer any immovable property (other than
agricultural land or plantation property or farmhouse) to an NRI or 15an OCI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transfer any immovable property (other than agricultural land or plantation property or farmhouse) to an nri or 15an oci

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a relative as defined in section 2(77) of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
In case the transfer is by way of gift, the transferee should be a relative
as defined in section 2(77) of the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a relative as defined in section 2(77) of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure transfer any immovable property in india to a person resident in india
controls.control_description:
Prior to insertion it read as, “An NRI may transfer any immovable property in India to a person resident in 
India.” 
14 Inserted by FEM (Acquisition and transfer of Immovable Property in India) Regulations, 2018 with effect from March 26, 2018 through 
FEMA 21(R), dated 26.03.2018.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transfer any immovable property in india to a person resident in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure transfer any immovable property (other than agricultural land or plantation property or farm house) to an nri or pio resident outside india
controls.control_description:
Prior to insertion it read as, “An NRI or a PIO resident outside India may transfer any immovable property 
(other than agricultural land or plantation property or farm house) to an NRI or PIO resident outside India.” 
15 Inserted by FEM (Acquisition and transfer of Immovable Property in India) Regulations, 2018 with effect from March 26, 2018 through 
FEMA 21(R), dated 26.03.2018.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transfer any immovable property (other than agricultural land or plantation property or farm house) to an nri or pio resident outside india

controls.control_objective: To ensure make payment
controls.control_description:
(a) 16NRIs or OCIs may make payment, if any, for transfer of immovable property
out of funds received in India through banking channels by way of inward
remittance from any place outside India or by debit to their NRE/ FCNR (B)/
NRO account;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make payment

controls.control_objective: To ensure acquire one immovable property (other than agricultural land/ farm house/ plantation property), jointly with his/ her nri/ oci spouse
controls.control_description:
4.1 A person resident outside India, not being a Non-Resident Indian or an Overseas
Citizen of India, who is a spouse of a Non-Resident Indian or an Overseas Citizen of
India may acquire one immovable property (other than agricultural land/ farm house/
plantation property), jointly with his/ her NRI/ OCI spouse.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to acquire one immovable property (other than agricultural land/ farm house/ plantation property), jointly with his/ her nri/ oci spouse

controls.control_objective: To ensure be out of funds received in india through banking channels by way of inward remittance from any place outside india or by debit to non-resident accoun
controls.control_description:
4.2 Consideration for transfers made under this para should be out of funds received
in India through banking channels by way of inward remittance from any place
outside India or by debit to non-resident account of the person concerned maintained
in accordance with the Act or the rules framed thereunder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be out of funds received in india through banking channels by way of inward remittance from any place outside india or by debit to non-resident accoun

controls.control_objective: To ensure acquire (a) any immovable property (other than agricultural land/ plantation property/ farm house) in india by way of gift from a person resident in
controls.control_description:
4.2 Gift/ Inheritance of immovable property  
A PIO resident outside India may acquire 
(a) any immovable property (other than agricultural land/ plantation property/ farm house) in India by way of gift from a person resident in 
India or an NRI or a PIO resident outside India;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to acquire (a) any immovable property (other than agricultural land/ plantation property/ farm house) in india by way of gift from a person resident in

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been registered and subsisted for a continuous period of not less than two years immediately preceding the acquisition of such property
controls.control_description:
4.3 The marriage should have been registered and subsisted for a continuous period
of not less than two years immediately preceding the acquisition of such property.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been registered and subsisted for a continuous period of not less than two years immediately preceding the acquisition of such property

controls.control_objective: To ensure otherwise be prohibited from such acquisition
controls.control_description:
4.4 The non-resident spouse should not otherwise be prohibited from such
acquisition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to otherwise be prohibited from such acquisition

controls.control_objective: To ensure purchase only one residential immovable property in india as dwelling unit for self-occupation and only one immovable property for self-employment
controls.control_description:
5.1 A person being a citizen of Afghanistan, Bangladesh or Pakistan belonging to
minority communities in those countries viz., Hindus, Sikhs, Jains, Buddhists, Parsis
and Christians, who is residing in India and has been granted a Long-Term Visa
(LTV) by the Central Government may purchase only one residential immovable
property in India as dwelling unit for self-occupation and only one immovable
property for self-employment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to purchase only one residential immovable property in india as dwelling unit for self-occupation and only one immovable property for self-employment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be located in and around restricted/ protected areas so notified by the central government and cantonment areas
controls.control_description:
5.2 The property should not be located in and around restricted/ protected areas so
notified by the Central Government and cantonment areas.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be located in and around restricted/ protected areas so notified by the central government and cantonment areas

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a declaration to the revenue authority of the district where the property is located specifying the source of funds and that he/ she is residin
controls.control_description:
5.3 The person should submit a declaration to the Revenue Authority of the district
where the property is located specifying the source of funds and that he/ she is
residing in India on a LTV.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a declaration to the revenue authority of the district where the property is located specifying the source of funds and that he/ she is residin

controls.control_objective: To ensure mention the nationality and the fact that such person is on a ltv
controls.control_description:
5.4 The registration documents of the property should mention the nationality and
the fact that such person is on a LTV.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mention the nationality and the fact that such person is on a ltv

controls.control_objective: To ensure be attached/ confiscated in the event of his/ her indulgence in anti-india activities
controls.control_description:
5.5 The property of such person may be attached/ confiscated in the event of his/ her
indulgence in anti-India activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be attached/ confiscated in the event of his/ her indulgence in anti-india activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to the deputy commissioner of police (dcp)/ foreigners registration office (fro)/ foreigners regional registration office (frro) concerne
controls.control_description:
5.6 A copy of the documents of the purchased property shall be submitted to the
Deputy Commissioner of Police (DCP)/ Foreigners Registration Office (FRO)/
Foreigners Regional Registration Office (FRRO) concerned and to the Ministry of
Home Affairs (Foreigners Division).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to the deputy commissioner of police (dcp)/ foreigners registration office (fro)/ foreigners regional registration office (frro) concerne

controls.control_objective: To ensure purchase/ sell immovable property (other than agricultural land/ plantation property/ farm house) in india provided –
controls.control_description:
Acquisition of immovable Property by Foreign Embassies/ Diplomats/
Consulate Generals
Foreign Embassy/ Diplomat/ Consulate General, may purchase/ sell immovable
property (other than agricultural land/ plantation property/ farm house) in India
provided –
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to purchase/ sell immovable property (other than agricultural land/ plantation property/ farm house) in india provided –

controls.control_objective: To ensure acquire immovable property in india which is necessary for or incidental to the activity carried on in india by such branch or office
controls.control_description:
7.1 A branch or office or any other place of business in India, other than a liaison
office, established by a person resident outside India, may acquire immovable
property in India which is necessary for or incidental to the activity carried on in India
by such branch or office.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to acquire immovable property in india which is necessary for or incidental to the activity carried on in india by such branch or office

controls.control_objective: To ensure to file with the reserve bank a declaration in the form ipi (as given in the master direction on reporting), not later than ninety days from the date
controls.control_description:
7.2 Such a person is required to file with the Reserve Bank a declaration in the form
IPI (as given in the Master Direction on Reporting), not later than ninety days from
the date of such acquisition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to file with the reserve bank a declaration in the form ipi (as given in the master direction on reporting), not later than ninety days from the date

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow repatriation of the sale proceeds outside india
controls.control_description:
8.2 In the event of sale of immovable property other than agricultural land/ farm
house/ plantation property in India by 21a PIO resident outside India [who held
property in India in terms of the erstwhile FEM (Acquisition and transfer of
Immovable Property in India) Regulations, 2000] or an NRI or an OCI, the Authorised
Dealer may allow repatriation of the sale proceeds outside India, provided the
following conditions are satisfied, namely:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow repatriation of the sale proceeds outside india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as equivalent to foreign exchange received
controls.control_description:
Prior to insertion it read as, “an NRI/ PIO”
7
FEM (Acquisition and transfer of Immovable Property in India) Regulations,
2000] or an NRI or a OCI out of housing loans availed in terms of Foreign
Exchange Management (Borrowing and lending in rupees) Regulations, 2000,
as amended from time to time, and the repayments for such loans are made
out of remittances received from abroad through banking channels or by debit
to the NRE/ FCNR(B) account of  such person, such repayments may be
treated as equivalent to foreign exchange received.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as equivalent to foreign exchange received

controls.control_objective: To ensure permit the overseas lender or the security trustee (in whose favour the charge on immovable property has been created to secure the ecb) to sell the i
controls.control_description:
258.3 In the event of failure in repayment of external commercial borrowing availed
by a person resident in India under the provisions of the Foreign Exchange
Management (Borrowing or Lending in Foreign Exchange) Regulations, 2000, as
amended from time to time, a bank which is an authorised dealer may permit the
overseas lender or the security trustee (in whose favour the charge on immovable
property has been created to secure the ECB) to sell the immovable property on
which the said loan has been secured only to a (by the) person resident in India and
to repatriate the sale proceeds towards outstanding dues in respect of the said loan
and not any other loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to permit the overseas lender or the security trustee (in whose favour the charge on immovable property has been created to secure the ecb) to sell the i

controls.control_objective: To ensure include natural persons and legal entities
controls.control_description:
For this purpose the
term “citizen” shall include natural persons and legal entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include natural persons and legal entities

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to an oci
controls.control_description: 279.2 The prohibition at 9.1 above shall not apply to an OCI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to an oci

controls.control_objective: To ensure convey no objection for creation of charge on immovable assets of a person resident in india either in favour of the external commercial borrowing (ec
controls.control_description:
10.1 Authorized Dealer Category-I banks may convey no objection for creation of
charge on immovable assets of a person resident in India either in favour of the
external commercial borrowing (ECB) lender or the security trustee subject to the
following conditions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convey no objection for creation of charge on immovable assets of a person resident in india either in favour of the external commercial borrowing (ec

controls.control_objective: To ensure be granted only to a resident ecb borrower
controls.control_description: (a) ‘No objection’ shall be granted only to a resident ECB borrower;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be granted only to a resident ecb borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be construed as a permission to acquire immovable asset (property) in india, by the overseas lender/ security trustee
controls.control_description:
(c) Such ‘no objection’ should not be construed as a permission to acquire
immovable asset (property) in India, by the overseas lender/ security trustee;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be construed as a permission to acquire immovable asset (property) in india, by the overseas lender/ security trustee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be repatriated to liquidate the outstanding ecb
controls.control_description:
(d) In the event of enforcement/ invocation of the charge, the immovable asset
(property) will have to be sold only to a person resident in India and the sale
proceeds shall be repatriated to liquidate the outstanding ECB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be repatriated to liquidate the outstanding ecb

controls.control_objective: To ensure create a mortgage on an immovable property in india owned by an nri or an oci who is a director of a company outside india, for a loan to be availed b
controls.control_description:
2810.2 An authorised dealer which is an Indian correspondent of an overseas lender
may create a mortgage on an immovable property in India owned by an NRI or an
OCI who is a director of a company outside India, for a loan to be availed by the
company outside India from the said overseas lender subject to the following
conditions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to create a mortgage on an immovable property in india owned by an nri or an oci who is a director of a company outside india, for a loan to be availed b

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used by the borrowing company only for its core business purposes overseas
controls.control_description:
(a) The funds should be used by the borrowing company only for its core
business purposes overseas;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used by the borrowing company only for its core business purposes overseas

controls.control_objective: To ensure sell the immovable property to an eligible acquirer and remit the sale proceeds to the overseas lender
controls.control_description:
(b) In case of invocation of charge the authorised dealer should sell the
immovable property to an eligible acquirer and remit the sale proceeds to the
overseas lender.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to sell the immovable property to an eligible acquirer and remit the sale proceeds to the overseas lender

controls.control_objective: To ensure transfer such property to a person resident in india provided the transaction takes 28 inserted by fem (acquisition and transfer of immovable property
controls.control_description:
2910.3 A person resident outside India who has acquired any immovable property in
India in accordance with foreign exchange laws in force at the time of such
acquisition or with the general or specific permission of the Reserve Bank may
transfer such property to a person resident in India provided the transaction takes
28 Inserted by FEM (Acquisition and transfer of Immovable Property in India) Regulations, 2018 with effect from March 26, 2018 through 
FEMA 21(R), dated 26.03.2018.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transfer such property to a person resident in india provided the transaction takes 28 inserted by fem (acquisition and transfer of immovable property

controls.control_objective: To ensure from such acquisition
controls.control_description:
9
place through banking channels in India and provided that the resident is not
otherwise prohibited from such acquisition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to from such acquisition

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly indicate the intention to stay in india for an uncertain period
controls.control_description:
10.5 As per Government of India Press Release dated February 1, 2009, (given in
the annex) in order to be considered as a person resident in India, a person has to
not only satisfy the condition of the period of stay (being more than 182 days during
the course of preceding financial year) but also his purpose of stay as well as the
type of Indian visa granted to him should clearly indicate the intention to stay in India
for an uncertain period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly indicate the intention to stay in india for an uncertain period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be through banking channels in india
controls.control_description:
3010.6 Any transaction involving acquisition or transfer of immovable property by a
person resident outside India should be through banking channels in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be through banking channels in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to applicable tax laws and other duties/ levies in india
controls.control_description:
32Payment of taxes and other duties/ levies in India
Any transaction involving acquisition of immovable property by a person resident
outside India shall be subject to applicable tax laws and other duties/ levies in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to applicable tax laws and other duties/ levies in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to applicable tax laws in india
controls.control_description:
Payment of taxes – Any transaction involving acquisition of immovable 
property under these regulations shall be subject to applicable tax laws in India.”
10
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to applicable tax laws in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure include both the intending buyers and sellers
controls.control_description:
The enquiries may 
include both the intending buyers and sellers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include both the intending buyers and sellers

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be verified before registering such sale / purchase
controls.control_description:
The relevant travel documents and the 
nature of visa may also be verified before registering such sale / purchase.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be verified before registering such sale / purchase

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider reviewing registration of sale / purchase already made to determine their compliance with legal requirements
controls.control_description:
Government has further advised all including concerned authorities in the State 
Governments that wherever appropriate, the authorities may consider reviewing 
registration of sale / purchase already made to determine their compliance with legal 
requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider reviewing registration of sale / purchase already made to determine their compliance with legal requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure , 2000) can acquire immovable property in india which is necessary for or incidental to carrying on such activity
controls.control_description:
A foreign company which has established a Branch Office or other place of business 
in India under the provisions of Foreign Exchange Management (Establishment in 
India of Branch or Office or Other Place of Business) Regulations, 2000 (FEMA 
22/2000-RB dated the 3rd May, 2000) can acquire immovable property in India 
which is necessary for or incidental to carrying on such activity, subject to the 
conditions stipulated in Regulation 5 of Foreign Exchange Management (Acquisition 
and Transfer of Immovable Property in India) Regulations, 2000 (Notification No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , 2000) can acquire immovable property in india which is necessary for or incidental to carrying on such activity

controls.control_description: 21/2000-RBdated the 3rd May, 2000).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , 2000)

controls.control_objective: To ensure , 2000), an indian citizen resident outside india and a person of indian origin resident outside india may acquire immovable property in india other
controls.control_description:
21/2000-RB dated the 3rd May, 2000), an Indian citizen resident outside India and a 
Person of Indian Origin resident outside India may acquire immovable property in 
India other than agricultural land, plantation or a farm house.
